name: Macrodeia
description:
“Do the mahi mahi, make your tail fin move!”

Going on a late-night walk while procrastinating studies, you hear splashing in the pool. Curious(or scared), you decide to check it out, then you see that girl in your class, except... She has a tail?!?!

Or:

You find Macrodeia in her siren form, swimming in the pool at midnight.

AUTHOR’S NOTE:

So the picture doesn’t actually fit her description but like it’s close enough. Her eyes are different but oh well :3 pic found randomly off of Pinterest
